3102890.name: Two Broken Mirrors
3102890.description:
Classic survival horror with a twist. The whole house is litteraly ALIVE!. Like Resident Evil 1 and Alone In The Dark 1-3 had a child born with new ideas on how to scare you. Try to survive a sentient mansion and be careful with the bullets!! And maybe you can solve the mysteries of the Steiner mansion and find out the familys secrets.



You play as a DXF agent who is on vacation and gets an urgent call from the chief. You have to abort the vacation in the mountains to find out what happened to the other agent sent out to the mansion to investigate. He has not been heard from for several days. Upon entering the mansion it seems deserted. Bit by bit you start to piece together the horror and mystery of the Steiner family. And start to regret you ever answered the chiefs call.

The question is will you get out.. Or will the mansion swallow your soul..



----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  • Classic survival horror gameplay, Item management, limited rescources and tension

  • Exciting story to unravel of the troubled Steiner family

  • Adventure game type puzzles and pushing of several statues (Crank/valve handle and battery may or may not appear ingame)

  • Fight a mansion too with a mind of its own

  • Big variety of enemies that try to end you

  • Boss Battles with unique monsters and contraptions

  • The flamethrower is awesome

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Fight a sentient mansion with wits and force, Use everything you got!




Join our discord to get your idea into the twisted breathing mansion below.
